description:
Implement `hx-action-bar` (T3 tier) — 2/6 libraries ship this. Horizontal container for grouping related action buttons/controls.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-action-bar/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-action-bar.ts`, `hx-action-bar.styles.ts`, `hx-action-bar.stories.ts`, `hx-action-bar.test.ts`

**Props:** `size` (sm/md/lg — propagated to slotted buttons), `variant` (`default`|`outlined`|`filled` — bar background), `sticky` (boolean — sticky to top/bottom)

**Slots:** `start` (left-aligned actions), default (center content), `end` (right-aligned actions), `overflow` (actions hidden in overflow menu when space is limited)

**Events:** none

**CSS Parts:** `base`, `start`, `center`, `end`

**ARIA:** `role="toolbar"` with `aria-label`. Keyboard: Arrow Left/Right navigate between focusable items within toolbar (roving tabindex pattern).

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (slotting, keyboard nav between buttons), axe-core zero violations, Storybook with rich toolbar demo, bundle < 3KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-action-bar — T3 Action/Toolbar Bar
